title: If 3I happened and we were all tanged
display_title: If 3I happened and we were all tanged
wikitext:
[]: If 3I happened and we were all tanged...             Quote Post by Agentomega » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:07 pm where would you return? I mean in theory, if humanity turns into one giant sea of tang, and we exist everywhere and nowhere, in theory we can return from being tang wherever we decide to exist. Also, in theory, one could alter one's appearance based on one's image of oneself. So, 2 questions: Where would you return to existance, and what would you choose to look like (note: it still has to be human in form. equivalent exchange and all that). I think I'd come back in Japan (first thing I'd prolly see is Third children strangling the Second, and if in this reality he doesn't stop, I'd prolly punch him in the face), and second, hell, I'd prolly choose to come back as a girl. I don't know why though...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:27 pm I would come back as some immortal ultra-powerful crocodile-like giant monster with tons of powers, and protect the Earth. When humans leave to go live in space I would stay behind protect sentient species that would appear. After long time and when all life dies when the sun burns out I would jet off to another planet with sentient life to the next until the end of the universe. After that I would try to find away to go to another universe and protect things. Or if I was in a extremely bad mood when I was tanged I would come back as the creature described above, but instead of protecting things, I would become a universally feared killing machine in a leaving behind scorched, radioactive, toxic, dead worlds.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:55 pm There is a thread like this somewhere...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 4:58 pm 1. I would come back in the year 1992 or so when I was a lot younger. I would redo my school days and do a lot of things differently.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Wed Jul 15, 2009 5:03 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: There is a thread like this somewhere...

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Wed Jul 15, 2009 5:27 pm If I came back in Japan, I'd help the Third choke the Second, and then sucker-punch Shinji in the face for sucking so much. Then, I'd go and do all of the things I wanted to do when I was surrounded by people and laws, but couldn't because of the aforementioned. Oh, and assuming that it is possible, I'd be a girl just for the hell of it, I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 6:29 pm Man, does everyone wish to strangle everyone? Its like sex to them haha.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:15 pm So, 2 questions: Where would you return to existance, and what would you choose to look like (note: it still has to be human in form. equivalent exchange and all that).

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:32 pm XD Yep, it's just barely within bounds... Although, I think there might be a few people who come back without a set of arms or a boob...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:36 pm Wait, we can come back with boobies..I pick that option.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Wed Jul 15, 2009 7:55 pm Everyone wants to come back from the tang with girl parts, huh? So you guys are all for genben IRL, after all... I'll be the one looking at you guys struggle with your freshly detanged girliness, and laughing my sides off... ;) If all the dudes decide to come back with girl parts though, Mankind is doomed...

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Wed Jul 15, 2009 8:06 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Wait, we can come back with boobies..I pick that option.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Jul 15, 2009 8:23 pm I'll be the one looking at you guys struggle with your freshly detanged girliness, and laughing my sides off...

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Jul 15, 2009 8:35 pm I'd come back as Burth Reynolds. And the proceed to take over the world with my whitty sense of humor and awesome moosetache. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Wed Jul 15, 2009 8:36 pm schismatics wrote: I'd come back as Burth Reynolds. And the proceed to take over the world with my whitty sense of humor and awesome moosetache. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Jul 15, 2009 8:38 pm ^ I'm crying right now with laughter. NO LIE.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Jul 15, 2009 10:08 pm I'd go back to 2005 but be the age I am now. I think I would enjoy things a lot better

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:16 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: I'd go back to 2005 but be the age I am now. I think I would enjoy things a lot better

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:27 pm scarmullet wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: I'd go back to 2005 but be the age I am now. I think I would enjoy things a lot better

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:47 pm Since we are talking if we were to go back to a year... I'd go back no so far to... hurt people... certain people...
